<?php require(__DIR__.'/../src/Twilio/autoload.php'); use Twilio\Rest\Client; $sid = getenv('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID'); $token = getenv('TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN'); $client = new Client($sid, $token); // Create Trunk $trunk = $client->trunking->v1->trunks->create( [ "friendlyName" => "shiny trunk", "secure" => false ] ); print("\n".$trunk."\n");
